meta.product_contents: Tapabocas x50 + Gorro Oruga x50 + Guantes Nitrilo x100

prompts.headline: ¿Guantes sin combinar? Eso era antes.
prompts.prompt: Professional Meta Ad for beauty supply brand PROVI. Split composition: LEFT SIDE labeled 'Antes' shows mismatched disposable gloves in random colors (blue, green, white) scattered messily on a gray surface, desaturated muted tones, cheap plastic feel. RIGHT SIDE labeled 'Kit Lila PROVI' shows a perfectly arranged flat lay of coordinated lilac gloves box, lilac face mask box, and lilac hair nets on a clean white marble surface, vibrant purple #A855F7 accent lighting. Bold Montserrat font headline at top: '¿Guantes sin combinar? Eso era antes.' Bottom CTA bar in teal #2CB1BC with white text: 'Pídelo por WhatsApp ➜'. INVIMA badge in corner. Studio lighting, commercial photography quality, 1:1 square format.
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, text errors, watermark, low quality, distorted products

prompts.headline: Tu competencia sigue usando azul. Tú ya tienes el Kit Lila.
prompts.prompt: Vertical Meta Ad 4:5 for PROVI beauty supplies. Bold comparison ad. TOP HALF: photo of a messy nail tech table with generic blue nitrile gloves, generic white face masks, no coordination, plain boring aesthetic, labeled 'La competencia' in gray italic. BOTTOM HALF: same type of professional nail tech table but pristine, with perfectly coordinated lilac/purple gloves, lilac face masks, lilac hair nets arranged neatly, purple gradient background #A855F7 to #C084FC, labeled 'Tú con el Kit Lila PROVI' in bold white Montserrat. Bottom strip: teal #2CB1BC background, bold white text 'Escríbenos al WhatsApp'. INVIMA certified badge. Commercial ad quality, high saturation on bottom half.
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, pixelated, bad typography, watermark

prompts.headline: Ellos cobran más. Tú llegas diferente.
prompts.prompt: Square Meta Ad 1:1 for PROVI. Professional beauty industry comparison. Left column header 'Compra individual' in gray: shows price tags floating above generic gloves box ($26.900), generic mask box ($19.900), generic hair net pack ($12.000), total circled in red: $58.800. Right column header 'Kit Lila PROVI' in vibrant purple #A855F7: shows the full coordinated kit in lilac packaging, single price tag: $41.950 COP, green savings badge '¡Ahorras $16.850!'. Background: white with subtle purple gradient on right side. Montserrat Bold typography throughout. Bottom CTA: teal bar with 'Cotiza por WhatsApp ➜'. INVIMA logo badge. Clean infographic style, commercial quality.
prompts.negative_prompt: cluttered, illegible text, low contrast, watermark

prompts.headline: Profesional se ve. Profesional se siente.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad for PROVI Kit Lila. Lifestyle comparison ad for beauty professionals. TOP: dark moody photo of nail technician hands wearing mismatched generic blue gloves working on a client, dull uninspiring colors, 'Sin el Kit Lila' label. BOTTOM: bright vibrant photo of the same nail technician scene but now wearing perfectly coordinated lilac purple gloves, purple mask, purple hair net, professional and stylish, purple lighting accents #A855F7, 'Con el Kit Lila PROVI' label in white Montserrat Bold. Price badge: '$41.950 COP | Registro INVIMA'. Bottom CTA strip: teal #2CB1BC, white bold: 'Haz tu pedido por WhatsApp'. High-end commercial photography feel.
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry faces, bad skin, low resolution, watermark

prompts.headline: 3 productos. 1 precio. 1 envío.
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad for PROVI Kit Lila Completo. Clean product breakdown infographic. White background with soft purple gradient (#C084FC to #FFFFFF). Three product cards arranged in a row: Card 1 shows lilac face mask box with label 'Tapabocas x50', icon tick, Card 2 shows lilac nitrile gloves box 'Guantes Nitrilo x100', icon tick, Card 3 shows lilac hair nets pack 'Gorro Oruga x50', icon tick. All cards connected by plus signs in teal #2CB1BC. Below a bold equals sign leads to: large purple box showing 'Kit Lila Completo $41.950' with savings badge in orange #F7630C '$16.850 de ahorro'. Top headline Montserrat ExtraBold: '3 productos. 1 precio. 1 envío.' Bottom CTA: teal bar 'Pídelo por WhatsApp ➜ | Registro INVIMA'. Ultra clean commercial style.
prompts.negative_prompt: messy layout, blurry, incorrect numbers, watermark

prompts.headline: Todo lo que necesitas para trabajar hoy.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad for PROVI. Product showcase with value emphasis. Dark navy background #0F2A43 for premium feel. Center: elegant flat lay product photography of Kit Lila Completo — lilac nitrile gloves box, lilac face masks box, lilac hair nets neatly arranged in a triangle composition on a white marble surface, with soft purple ambient lighting #A855F7. Top: white Montserrat headline 'Todo lo que necesitas para trabajar hoy.' Product labels with checkmarks in purple: '✓ Tapabocas x50 Lila', '✓ Gorro Oruga x50 Lila', '✓ Guantes Nitrilo x100 Lila'. Price displayed prominently: '$41.950 COP' with original price struck through '$51.950'. INVIMA badge in gold. Bottom CTA: teal #2CB1BC strip 'Escríbenos y te asesoramos ➜'.
prompts.negative_prompt: dark muddy colors, blurry products, cheap looking, watermark

prompts.headline: Certif icado INVIMA. Precio de distribuidor.
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad for PROVI Kit Lila. Trust and value ad. Clean white background. Center: large high-quality product photo of the Kit Lila with all three components (lilac gloves, masks, hair nets) neatly arranged. Large INVIMA certification badge prominently displayed in green/gold seal design. Value breakdown sidebar: teal #2CB1BC left border strip with white text listing benefits: '✓ Certificado INVIMA', '✓ Precio mayorista', '✓ Envío gratis desde $150K', '✓ Tallas S, M, L', '✓ Entrega 48-72h'. Bottom: purple #A855F7 banner with white Montserrat Bold: 'Kit Lila Completo — $41.950 COP'. CTA button: teal 'Cotiza por WhatsApp ➜'. Commercial product photography, trustworthy and clean aesthetic.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake badges, blurry seals, cluttered layout, watermark

prompts.headline: Ahorra $16.850 comprando el kit completo.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. Savings-focused ad. Bright white background with soft purple gradient bottom half. Top: bold orange #F7630C savings badge large and prominent '¡AHORRAS $16.850!' with starburst effect. Middle: product image of Kit Lila Completo on white surface, professional lit, lilac color hero. Price comparison graphic: original price '$51.950' with red strikethrough line, current price '$41.950 COP' in large bold purple #A855F7 Montserrat. Small text 'Precio de distribuidor | Registro INVIMA'. Bottom: countdown urgency element 'Stock limitado' in orange. CTA strip teal #2CB1BC: 'Haz tu pedido por WhatsApp ➜'. High-energy commercial ad style.
prompts.negative_prompt: wrong prices, blurry, fake urgency elements, watermark

prompts.headline: "Mi clientela siempre pregunta por mis guantes lilas"
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad PROVI. UGC-style static testimonial ad. Warm, authentic aesthetic. Background: soft blush/cream with subtle purple tones. Main image: overhead shot of a nail technician's work station — lilac gloves hands working on a manicure client's nails, Kit Lila products visible on the side table, professional but personal feel, natural lighting. Large quote bubble in white with purple border: '"Mi clientela siempre pregunta por mis guantes lilas"' in Poppins italic. Attribution: 'Laura M. — Manicurista profesional ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐' in small gray text. Product tag floating: 'Kit Lila Completo $41.950'. Bottom CTA: teal #2CB1BC 'Pídelo por WhatsApp ➜'. Authentic, relatable, warm aesthetic not over-produced.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake looking, stock photo feel, over-produced, watermark

prompts.headline: "Llegó en 2 días y el color es exactamente el que esperaba"
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. UGC unboxing testimonial. Authentic feel. Main image: close-up photo of hands unboxing the Kit Lila — lilac gloves box, lilac mask box, lilac hair nets visible inside a plain cardboard delivery box with PROVI branding, soft natural window lighting, warm wood table surface. Large pull-quote overlay in white rounded rectangle: '"Llegó en 2 días y el color es exactamente el que esperaba"' Poppins italic. Star rating ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ in gold. Name: 'Valentina R. — Esteticista, Medellín'. Bottom: purple #A855F7 strip with product info and teal CTA: 'Escríbenos al WhatsApp'. Feels like a real customer post, organic UGC quality.
prompts.negative_prompt: overly polished, fake unboxing, bad lighting, watermark

prompts.headline: "Mis clientes me dicen que parezco más profesional"
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad PROVI. Professional upgrade testimonial UGC. Before/after style within single frame. Main image: beauty professional (aesthetician) at work wearing full coordinated Kit Lila — lilac gloves, lilac mask, lilac hair net — working on facial treatment, looking confident and professional. Warm clinic lighting with purple accent. Quote card in bottom third: '"Mis clientes me dicen que parezco más profesional"' white text on dark navy #0F2A43 semi-transparent overlay, Poppins italic. Attribution: 'Daniela C. — Centro de Estética, Bogotá ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐'. Kit label: 'Kit Lila Completo | INVIMA'. CTA strip teal: 'Cotiza por WhatsApp ➜'.
prompts.negative_prompt: bad skin textures, unrealistic, over-filtered, watermark

prompts.headline: "Lo pedí por WhatsApp y en 3 días tenía el kit"
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. Speed and ease of ordering testimonial. Clean lifestyle setting. Main image: young Colombian woman (dental assistant or nail tech) smiling while holding the Kit Lila bag/box, wearing scrubs, bright professional environment, natural warm light, authentic and joyful expression. WhatsApp chat bubble graphic overlay showing a simple ordering exchange: 'Hola, quiero el Kit Lila S' — 'Hola! Con gusto, te lo enviamos hoy' with checkmarks. Quote: '"Lo pedí por WhatsApp y en 3 días tenía el kit"' in white speech bubble. Name: 'Camila T. — Auxiliar de consultorio ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐'. Bottom: teal bar 'Haz tu pedido por WhatsApp ➜ 312 678 6075'.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake chat bubbles, bad expressions, low quality photo, watermark

prompts.headline: Stock limitado. Escríbenos antes de que se agote.
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad PROVI. High urgency scarcity ad. Deep purple #A855F7 to navy #0F2A43 gradient background. Product: Kit Lila Completo displayed with only 3 boxes remaining visual (low stock indicator bar below). Large bold white Montserrat headline: 'Stock limitado.' Second line smaller: 'Escríbenos antes de que se agote.' Countdown visual element showing urgency in orange #F7630C. Price badge: '$41.950 COP | Precio de distribuidor'. WhatsApp green icon #25D366 large and prominent with phone number 312 678 6075. CTA button: green WhatsApp style button 'Escríbenos al WhatsApp ➜'. INVIMA badge. High energy, urgency-driven commercial ad.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake countdowns, dishonest claims, low quality, watermark

prompts.headline: Hoy pedido. En 48h en tu negocio.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. Speed of delivery urgency ad. Clean white background with blue/teal gradient bottom. Headline top: bold Montserrat ExtraBold dark navy 'Hoy pedido.' Second line teal #2CB1BC: 'En 48h en tu negocio.' Center: flat lay of Kit Lila Completo (lilac gloves, masks, hair nets) on white surface with a delivery timeline graphic below: icons and labels '📱 Escríbenos por WhatsApp → 📦 Pedido confirmado → 🚚 Envío nacional → ✅ En tu negocio en 48-72h'. Purple #A855F7 accent colors on timeline. Price: '$41.950 COP | Envío gratis desde $150K'. Bottom CTA: large teal button 'Pídelo por WhatsApp ➜' with WhatsApp icon in green.
prompts.negative_prompt: complex timeline, unreadable icons, blurry, watermark

prompts.headline: ¿Ya tienes el kit para la semana?
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad PROVI. Conversational WhatsApp-native urgency ad. Warm white background. Center visual: mockup of a WhatsApp Business chat interface showing PROVI conversation — professional PROVI profile pic with teal branding, message thread: customer message 'Hola, necesito el Kit Lila talla M' with read receipts, PROVI response: 'Hola! Tenemos disponibilidad inmediata 🙌 Te lo enviamos hoy. $41.950 COP ¿Te lo separamos?' with green double checkmarks. Above chat: Montserrat Bold dark headline '¿Ya tienes el kit para la semana?'. Below: lilac gloves and mask mini product photo. CTA strip teal: 'Cotiza por WhatsApp ➜ 312 678 6075'. Realistic, trustworthy, conversational.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake chat UI, wrong WhatsApp branding, blurry text, watermark

prompts.headline: No esperes a quedarte sin guantes un lunes.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. Pain point urgency ad for beauty professionals. Split scene: TOP: slightly dramatic photo of empty gloves box, frustrated professional looking at empty supply cabinet, muted gray tones, caption 'El lunes sin guantes...' in gray italic. BOTTOM: bright vibrant scene of organized professional workspace with Kit Lila products stacked and ready, lilac color palette dominant, professional smiling, caption 'Cuando pides por WhatsApp con PROVI' in white on purple. Center dividing banner in orange #F7630C: 'Nunca más te quedes sin stock'. Bottom: teal CTA bar 'Haz tu pedido por WhatsApp ➜' with product price '$41.950 COP' and INVIMA badge.
prompts.negative_prompt: overly negative tone, dark imagery, scary, watermark

prompts.angle_label: Bioseguridad y Estética — Lila como Diferenciador
prompts.headline: El lila que te hace ver diferente.
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad PROVI. Premium aesthetic and biosafety brand ad. Luxurious purple gradient background #A855F7 to #7C3AED. Center: artistic flat lay of the complete Kit Lila — lilac nitrile gloves box, lilac face masks box, lilac hair nets — arranged elegantly on white marble with small purple dried flowers as decoration, cinematic studio lighting with purple rim light. Top: white thin Montserrat headline 'El lila que te hace ver diferente.' Purple foil-effect PROVI logo. Bottom section: two icons side by side — biosafety shield icon 'Certificado INVIMA' and diamond icon 'Estética Profesional'. CTA: semi-transparent teal button 'Pídelo por WhatsApp ➜'. Magazine-quality commercial photography.
prompts.negative_prompt: cheap looking, bad flowers, cluttered, watermark

prompts.angle_label: Bioseguridad y Estética — Lila como Diferenciador
prompts.headline: Bioseguridad con estilo. Solo en PROVI.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. Biosafety meets beauty aesthetic ad. Elegant clinical-meets-beauty visual. Background: white clinical setting with subtle purple gradient accents. Main image: close-up hands of beauty professional wearing lilac nitrile gloves performing a precise nail art or microblading procedure, ultra sharp focus on the lilac gloves, professional and sterile yet beautiful and aesthetic. Overlay text top: teal banner 'Certificado INVIMA ✓'. Center floating badge: large purple #A855F7 circle with white text '100% Seguro y Estético'. Below product: 'Kit Lila Completo — Tapabocas + Gorro + Guantes'. Price: '$41.950 COP'. Bottom CTA teal: 'Escríbenos y te asesoramos ➜'. High-end beauty brand feel.
prompts.negative_prompt: unsafe medical imagery, bad hands, blur, watermark

prompts.angle_label: Bioseguridad y Estética — Lila como Diferenciador
prompts.headline: El color que tus clientes recuerdan.
prompts.prompt: Square 1:1 Meta Ad PROVI. Branding differentiation ad through color. Clean minimal design. White background. Main visual: three identical professional nail tech hand poses side by side — FIRST wearing blue generic gloves labeled 'Todos', SECOND wearing white generic gloves labeled 'Todos', THIRD wearing vibrant lilac PROVI gloves with a glow/spotlight effect labeled 'Tú' with a star and highlighted. All very stylized, clean, editorial feel. Headline above in dark navy Montserrat ExtraBold: 'El color que tus clientes recuerdan.' Below: 'Kit Lila PROVI — $41.950 | Registro INVIMA'. Bottom CTA: teal #2CB1BC 'Cotiza por WhatsApp ➜'. Minimalist editorial ad style.
prompts.negative_prompt: complicated layout, bad hands anatomy, blurry, watermark

prompts.angle_label: Bioseguridad y Estética — Lila como Diferenciador
prompts.headline: Protección certificada. Imagen que impacta.
prompts.prompt: Vertical 4:5 Meta Ad PROVI. Dual value proposition ad — safety + beauty. Elegant split layout. TOP HALF: dark navy #0F2A43 background with INVIMA certification seal prominently displayed, white headline 'Protección certificada.' with biosafety shield icons, professional clinical feel. BOTTOM HALF: vibrant purple #A855F7 background with stylish beauty lifestyle image — coordinated lilac gloves, masks, hair nets in aesthetic arrangement with beauty tools (nail file, brush), white headline 'Imagen que impacta.' Kit Lila product tag with price '$41.950 COP'. Center divider: slim teal #2CB1BC line connecting both worlds. Bottom CTA bar: teal 'Haz tu pedido por WhatsApp ➜ 312 678 6075'. Premium dual-identity commercial ad.
prompts.negative_prompt: misaligned halves, ugly product placement, dark muddy, watermark
